settings.text:
Contact Us:

Business Address: Hugbel LLC. 30 N Gould St Ste R, Sheridan, WY 82801

  • Email: Info@hugbel.com

  • WhatsApp: +1 725-243-4529

  • Tel: +1-725-243-4529

Hugbel provides specification-grade lighting designed for reliable performance in residential and light commercial projects.

Our fixtures are engineered with accurate voltage compatibility (110–120V / 220–240V), proper driver selection, and certified components that meet global standards including UL, CE, RoHS, and AS/NZS.

We work directly with specialized manufacturers to ensure consistent lumen output, stable color temperature, safe thermal management, and long-term electrical reliability.

From pendant lights to chandeliers, our collection blends style with safety. We also offer customization to bring your vision to life—perfect for any project, big or small.

Why Choose Us?

  • Global Reach: Fast, reliable shipping from our worldwide warehouses.

  • Certified Safety: Products meet international standards (UL, CE, AS/NZS).

  • Custom Solutions: Tailored lighting designs to suit your unique needs.

  • Expert Curation: Stylish and functional lighting for every space.

Where lighting is not just our business but our passion. Every piece we create begins with a simple belief: light should feel. Feel warm, feel natural, feel human.

From paper and alabaster to stone and metal, our materials are chosen for how they hold light — not just how they look.

The result is illumination that shapes emotion, softens architecture, and helps your home feel quietly alive.

We take pride in illuminating your spaces with warmth and elegance. Our commitment to quality craftsmanship and personalized service shines through in every fixture we offer.

With our own factory partnership and strict quality inspection, our prices reflect quality in the finish & materials chosen. It also ensures our workers are paid fairly, unlike other fast home decor brands. 

For project-based needs, we offer customised sizing, material variations, dimming compatibility (Triac, ELV, 0–10V, DALI), and tailored solutions to support renovation schedules, procurement timelines, and region-specific compliance.

We also provide a longer warranty compared to many online stores & offer trade discounts. We can also help source any beautiful lamp or furniture item you see online (or similar to).

Get in touch with us at info@hugbel.com

Our in-house technicians bring unmatched expertise and attention to detail, ensuring every fixture fits seamlessly into your space. From minor adjustments to full customization, we offer a wide range of bespoke services to meet your needs.

Popular Customizations Include:

  • Adjusting Hanging Length: Achieve the perfect height for your lighting fixtures.
  • Changing Material Color or Finish: Choose the exact color or finish that complements your décor.
  • Modifying Light Emitting Color: Set the perfect ambiance with warm, cool, or neutral lighting.
  • Adding Dimmable Functionality: Enjoy flexible lighting control with dimmable options.
  • Altering Size or Dimensions: Fit your lighting into any space, no matter the size or shape.
  • Redesigning the Fixture: We can create an entirely new fixture based on your design ideas.

Get in touch at sales@hugbel.com for tailored solution.
